overall.description: A cinematic slow pan across a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night during a heavy rainstorm. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 reveals neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and distant flying vehicles from a high rooftop vantage point overlooking Night City.

events.description: flying vehicle passes horizontally through the distant skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary on a high rooftop, slowly panning the camera right to survey the rainy neon cityscape

notable_agents.action: flying car moving across the distant skyline through the rain

entered.detail: Dark industrial tower with bright vertical white lights and antenna spires
Orange neon sign reading PLAZA mounted on a rooftop in the foreground
Dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers forming the central city core
Large circular red holographic advertisement floating between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk skyline from a high rooftop vantage. To the left stands a prominent industrial tower with vertical white lights, while an orange neon PLAZA sign glows in the foreground. The camera slowly pans right across the hazy cityscape, revealing dense clusters of illuminated skyscrapers and a distant flying vehicle cutting through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: central business district with art deco towers

events.description: view shifts from industrial left district to central business district as the white neon tower enters frame

agents.ego_description: continuing the slow rightward pan across the neon-lit city center, focusing on emerging architectural landmarks

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle ascending vertically near the distant towers

entered.detail: Tall art deco building with distinctive vertical white neon strip lighting outlining its facade
Very tall slender tower covered in colorful changing holographic advertisements and digital displays

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning right, the industrial tower and PLAZA sign exit the frame, transitioning to the central business district. A distinctive white-lit art deco tower emerges on the right, while in the far distance, a massive holographic spire with changing digital advertisements becomes visible. The rain maintains its steady haze across the neon-lit urban expanse.

events.description: holographic spire becomes the dominant visual feature as the camera focuses on the right side of the city

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic sweep with focus on the illuminated holographic tower and nearby rooftop structures

entered.detail: Rooftop terrace with warm ambient lighting and structural canopies visible in the right foreground

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the rightmost district, where the tall holographic spire dominates the view with its bright, shifting digital displays. The white neon tower recedes to the left as the camera reveals detailed rooftop structures in the foreground on the right. The heavy rain continues to fall across the sprawling neon cityscape, completing the 180-degree panoramic view from the rooftop perch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous panoramic sweep across a rain-soaked cyberpunk skyline that shifts from an industrial sector to a towering holographic business district. It begins from a high rooftop vantage point, panning right past a prominent industrial tower with vertical white lights and a glowing orange PLAZA sign. As the camera continues its movement, these foreground elements exit the frame to reveal a central business district characterized by a white-lit art deco tower and a massive, distant holographic spire. The scene then expands further right, allowing the holographic spire to dominate the view with its shifting digital advertisements while the art deco tower recedes. Finally, the camera settles on detailed rooftop structures in the immediate foreground, completing a wide arc across the sprawling, neon-lit urban expanse under a steady haze of heavy rain.
